NAME: Korean Genome Project Phase 2
NOTE: Second phase of Korean Genome Project
MANUAL_CITATION: Jeon, S., Choi, H., Jeon, Y., Choi, W. H., Choi, H., An, K., ... & Bhak, J. (2024). Korea4K: whole genome sequences of 4,157 Koreans with 107 phenotypes derived from extensive health check-ups. GigaScience, 13, giae014.
DESCRIPTION: Korea4K is the second phase data release of the Korean Genome Project (KGP).
